svg.title: RAG pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Two-phase pipeline: ingestion (scrape to ChromaDB) and query (question to answer)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the scraper fetch URLs?')
sendPrompt('How is HTML converted to markdown?')
sendPrompt('How does similarity search work in ChromaDB?')
sendPrompt('How does the lexical fallback work?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini generate the answer?')
sendPrompt('What does the final response include?')
